tags.name: orgDetails
tags.description: Manage details related to your organization.

tags.name: idpManagement
tags.description: Manage Identity Providers for your Organization.

tags.name: orgDomainManagement
tags.description: Manage domains related to your organization

tags.name: orgMemberManagement
tags.description: Manage members related to your organization

tags.name: clientGrantManagement
tags.description: Manage client grants for your organization

tags.name: clientManagement
tags.description: Manage API clients for your organization

get.description: Retrieve the My Organization API configuration. Returns only the `connection_deletion_behavior` and `allowed_strategies`. Identifier attributes such as `user_attribute_profile_id` and `connection_profile_id` are not included. Cache this information, as it does not change frequently.

Retrieve the [Connection Profile](https://auth0.com/docs/authenticate/enterprise-connections/connection-profile) for this application. You should cache this information as it does not change frequently.
Retrieve details for this Organization, including display name and branding options. To learn more about Auth0 Organizations, read [Organizations](https://auth0.com/docs/manage-users/organizations).

patch.description: Update details for this Organization, such as display name and branding options. To learn more about Auth0 Organizations, read [Organizations](https://auth0.com/docs/manage-users/organizations).

get.description: Retrieve a list of all pending and verified domains for this Organization.

post.description: Create a new domain for this Organization.

get.description: Retrieve details of a domain specified by ID for this Organization.

delete.description: Remove a domain specified by ID from this Organization.

post.description: Initiate the verification process for a domain specified by ID for this Organization.

get.summary: List Identity Providers for a domain
get.description: Retrieve the list of Identity Providers associated with a domain specified by ID for this Organization.
Retrieve a list of all Identity Providers for this Organization.

post.description: Create a new Identity Provider for this Organization.

get.description: Retrieve details of an Identity Provider specified by ID for this Organization.

patch.description: Update the details of an Identity Provider specified by ID for this Organization.

delete.description: Delete an Identity Provider specified by ID from this Organization. This will remove the association and delete the underlying Identity Provider. Members will no longer be able to authenticate using this Identity Provider.

put.description: Refresh the attribute mapping for an Identity Provider specified by ID for this Organization. Mappings are reset to the admin-defined defaults.

post.description: Remove an Identity Provider specified by ID from this Organization. This only removes the association; the underlying Identity Provider is not deleted. Members will no longer be able to authenticate using this Identity Provider.

post.summary: Associate a domain with an Identity Provider
post.description: Associate a domain with an Identity Provider specified by ID for this Organization. The domain must be claimed and verified.

delete.summary: Remove a domain from an Identity Provider
delete.description: Remove a domain specified by name from an Identity Provider specified by ID for this Organization.

get.description: Retrieve the Provisioning Configuration for an Identity Provider specified by ID for this Organization.

post.description: Create a new Provisioning Configuration for an Identity Provider specified by ID for this Organization.

delete.description: Delete the Provisioning Configuration for an Identity Provider specified by ID for this Organization.

put.description: Refresh the attribute mapping for the Provisioning Configuration of an Identity Provider specified by ID for this Organization. Mappings are reset to the admin-defined defaults.

get.description: Retrieve a list of [SCIM tokens](https://auth0.com/docs/authenticate/protocols/scim/configure-inbound-scim#scim-endpoints-and-tokens) for the Provisioning Configuration of an Identity Provider specified by ID for this Organization.

post.description: Create a new SCIM token for the Provisioning Configuration of an Identity Provider specified by ID for this Organization.

delete.description: Revoke a SCIM token specified by token ID for the Provisioning Configuration of an Identity Provider specified by ID for this Organization.

value.title: Insufficient Scope
value.detail: The auth token lacks the required scope: Check the API documentation for the required scopes for this endpoint.

value.title: Configuration issue
value.detail: Invalid or missing configuration, please contact tenant admin.

value.title: Duplicate Resource
value.detail: Domain is already associated with this identity provider

value.title: Endpoint Rate Limit Exceeded
value.detail: The endpoint request limit has been exceeded.

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: The number of allowed requests in the current rate limit window.

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: The number of remaining requests in the current rate limit window.

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: The Unix timestamp indicating when the current rate limit window resets.

Retry-After.description: The number of seconds the client should wait before making a new request.

X-Auth0-Error-Kind.description: An indicator that the rate limit exceeded a is global (per tenant) limit.

LuceneQueryParameter.name: q
LuceneQueryParameter.description: Query in Lucene query string syntax.

FieldsQueryParameter.name: fields
FieldsQueryParameter.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include or exclude (based on value provided for include_fields) in the result. Leave empty to retrieve all fields.

MemberInvitationFieldsQueryParameter.name: fields
MemberInvitationFieldsQueryParameter.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include or exclude (based on value provided for include_fields) in the result. Leave empty to retrieve all fields. Note: you cannot filter on ticket_id and this value will only be returned when fields are not filtered.

IncludeFieldsQueryParameter.name: include_fields
IncludeFieldsQueryParameter.description: Whether specified fields are to be included (true) or excluded (false). Defaults to true

PaginationFromQueryParameter.name: from
PaginationFromQueryParameter.description: An optional cursor from which to start the selection (exclusive).

PaginationTakeQueryParameter.name: take
PaginationTakeQueryParameter.description: Number of results per page. Defaults to 50.

LocaleQueryParameter.name: locale
LocaleQueryParameter.description: The locale for getting the correct custom_texts

SortQueryParameter.name: sort
SortQueryParameter.description: Field to sort by. Use field:order where order is 1 for ascending and -1 for descending. Defaults to created_at:-1

ListIdentityProvidersResponse.description: List of identity providers successfully retrieved.

DeleteIdentityProviderResponse.description: The identity provider was successfully removed from the organization.

DeleteIdpProvisioningConfigResponse.description: The Provisioning config was successfully removed from the identity provider.

ListDomainIdentityProvidersResponse.description: List identity providers for an organization domain.

DeleteOrganizationDomainResponse.description: The domain was successfully removed from the organization.

ListIdpProvisioningScimTokensResponse.description: List Provisioning SCIM tokens for an identity provider.

DeleteIdpProvisioningScimTokenResponse.description: The Provisioning SCIM token was successfully deleted.

GetOrganizationMemberResponse.description: Retrieve a member of the organization.

ListMembersInvitationsResponse.description: List Members Invitations for an Organization.

CreateMemberInvitationResponse.description: Create Member Invitations for an Organization.

GetMemberInvitationResponse.description: Get Member Invitation for an Organization by Id.

DetachIdpProviderResponse.description: The identity provider was successfully detached from the organization.

CreateIdpDomainResponse.description: Domain successfully associated with identity provider.

DeleteIdpDomainResponse.description: The domain was successfully removed from the identity provider.

ClientErrorBadRequestResponse.description: Invalid request body. The message will vary depending on the cause.

ValidationErrorBadRequestResponse.description: Invalid request body. The message will vary depending on the cause.

ClientErrorDomainAssociationConflictResp.description: Domain is already associated with this identity provider.

ClientErrorConfigConflictResponse.description: Missing or invalid server configuration, contact tenant admin.

ClientErrorTooManyRequestsResponse.description: Too many requests. Check the X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining and X-RateLimit-Reset headers.

ClientErrorUnauthorizedResponse.description: Unauthorized: token missing, invalid or expired.

DeleteOrganizationMembersResponse.description: The Organization members were removed successfully.

next.description: Pagination cursor for the next page of results

token_lifetime.description: Lifetime of the token in seconds. Do not set for non-expiring tokens.

next.description: Pagination cursor for the next page of results.

roles.description: List of role IDs to associate with the user.

ttl_sec.description: Number of seconds for which the invitation is valid before expiration. If unspecified or set to 0, this value defaults to 604800 seconds (7 days). Max value: 2592000 seconds (30 days).

audience.description: The audience (API identifier) of this client grant.

scope.description: Scopes allowed for this client grant.

scope.description: The scopes allowed for this client grant.

created_at.description: The ISO 8601 date and time when the client grant was created.
Timestamp when the client was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the client was last updated

client_secret.description: Client secret (ONLY returned on creation, never again)

OrgClient.description: API Client associated with the organization. Currently only supports M2M (non_interactive) clients.

OrgClientOrganizationUsageEnum.description: Defines whether users can log in to this client using organizations

OrgClientOrganizationRequireBehaviorEnum.description: Defines how organization is selected when organization_usage is 'require'

type.description: A URI that describes the error.

status.description: The HTTP status code result of the request.

title.description: A brief description of the error.

detail.description: A detailed description of the error.
A detailed description of the error.

field.description: The name of the invalid parameter.

pointer.description: JSON Pointer that points to the exact location of the error in a JSON document being validated.

source.description: Specifies the source of the error (e.g., body, query, or header in an HTML message).

type.description: A URI that describes the error.

status.description: The HTTP status code result of the request.

title.description: A brief description of the error.

IdentityProvidersConfigEnabledFeaturesEn.description: The enabled features for the identity provider

DomainVerificationEnum.description: Sets the policy for domain verification requirements

ClientName.description: Name of this client (min length: 1 character, does not allow < or >).

ClientDescription.description: Free text description of this client (max length: 140 characters).

ClientAppTypeEnum.description: The type of application this client represents

ClientTokenEndpointAuthMethodEnum.description: Authentication method for the token endpoint

ClientGrantTypes.description: List of grant types supported for this application. Only accepts ['client_credentials']

lifetime_in_seconds.description: Number of seconds the JWT will be valid

secret_encoded.description: Whether the client secret is base64 encoded

IdpStrategyEnum.description: The type of the identity provider

IdpProvisioningMethodEnum.description: The type of an identity provider's provisioning method

IdpOidcOptionsTypeEnum.description: Select whether authentication exchanges occur via server-to-server communication (Back Channel) or through the browser using Implicit Flow with Form Post (Front Channel)

IdpSignAlgTypeEnum.description: Select the algorithm used for signing

IdpSignAlgDigestTypeEnum.description: Select the algorithm digest used for signing

IdpProtocolBindingTypeEnum.description: HTTP binding supported by the IdP.

IdpConnectionDeletionBehaviorEnum.description: Specifies whether deletion of a connection is always allowed, or only when the connection has no associated users

IdpProvisioningScimTokenId.description: Identity provider Scim Provisioning Token identifier.

verification_txt.description: Value used to verify the domain.

user_attribute.description: The name of the user attribute.

description.description: The description of the user attribute.

label.description: The label of the user attribute.

is_required.description: Indicates if the attribute is required.

is_extra.description: Indicates whether this attribute is not part of the admin defined schema but is provided by the source. The property will be removed when a refresh operation is performed.

is_missing.description: Indicates whether this attribute is expected but not provided by the admin defined schema. The property will be added when a refresh operation is performed.

provisioning_field.description: The name of the provisioning field.

identity_provider_name.description: The name of the identity provider

valid_until.description: The token's valid until at timestamp (will not exist for non-expiring tokens).

created_at.description: The ISO 8601 formatted timestamp representing the creation time of the invitation.

expires_at.description: The ISO 8601 formatted timestamp representing the expiration time of the invitation.

invitation_url.description: The invitation url to be sent to the invitee.

ticket_id.description: The ID of the invitation ticket.

OrgMemberRoleId.description: The ID of a role that can be assigned to a member of an organization.

created_at.description: Date and time when this user was created (ISO_8601 format).

updated_at.description: Date and time when this user was last updated (ISO_8601 format).

last_login.description: Last date and time this user logged in (ISO_8601 format).
